name: Nine Iron Golf / Sports restaurant & lounge
about: Nine Iron Golf provides a premier indoor golf experience in Yakima, Washington, combining state-of-the-art golf simulation with a full-service sports restaurant and lounge. The facility features multiple indoor bays equipped with golf simulators, allowing players to tee off on over 100 stunning virtual golf courses. Alongside the golf offerings, the venue includes a full bar with local brews, wines, and handcrafted cocktails, as well as a menu of chef-crafted meals. The space is designed to accommodate various needs, from solo practice sessions and group outings to corporate events and private parties. With flexible hours that vary by season, the venue emphasizes a welcoming environment where both serious golfers and casual groups can enjoy a social and immersive golfing experience.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to 100+ stunning golf courses for year-round play
Full bar and restaurant offerings for a complete dining and golfing experience
Flexible event hosting for corporate meetings, birthdays, and large groups
On-site PGA professional instruction available for game improvement

food_and_drink.notes: Chef-crafted menu available with a variety of options
Full bar with local brews, wines, and handcrafted cocktails

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, you can bring your own clubs or rent them at the venue.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not permitted as the venue offers a full menu and bar service.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Playing 18 holes typically takes up to two hours per bay reservation.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Nine Iron Golf welcomes families and is suitable for kids, making it a great option for family outings.
